text: BIENESTAR MERCADO BIENESTAR MERCADO FOOD PANTRY AND FREE FOOD MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a mercado, that provides a wide assortment of fresh fruits and vegetables to community members. 6736 NE Killingsworth Street Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st and 3rd Wednesday of the month 9am-11am (503) 988-3509 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 988-3509 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near bus line 72 Services: Food Pantries Fresh Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
